warps.notes: Staircase down to 7F — northwest area of floor
Warp up to 9F — west-center area (alternate path)

notes: 8F is the second-most complex floor — six warp events (one down to 7F, five up to 9F).
Three item balls: Nugget at (7,13), Max Elixir at (11,6), Full Restore at (3,1).
The five upward warps to 9F lead to different landing positions on 9F, creating disorientation.
Players dropped at various 9F positions may loop back through 8F via 9F warps until they find the roof stair.
Full Restore at (3,1) is in the far northwest corner — highest value heal item in the tower.

items.name: Nugget
items.notes: Item ball (SPRITE_POKE_BALL). Script: TinTower8FNugget — itemball NUGGET. Worth 5000 when sold.

items.name: Max Elixir
items.notes: Item ball. Script: TinTower8FMaxElixer — itemball MAX_ELIXER (note: original ASM uses 'Elixer' spelling). Restores all PP.

items.name: Full Restore
items.notes: Item ball. Script: TinTower8FFullRestore — itemball FULL_RESTORE. In far northwest corner.

access_requirements.to_enter: Reached via stair up from 7F at (10,15) → 7F warp_id 2. Also reachable via 9F's return warps.
access_requirements.note: Players arriving from 9F may loop between 8F and 9F via the multiple warp connections.

warp_puzzle_notes.description: 8F has the most warp exits in the tower (five paths to 9F at different positions). This creates a maze effect where the player may need to traverse 9F multiple times to find the correct path to the roof staircase.

notes: Tin Tower 8F is 10x9 blocks (20x18 tiles). It is the penultimate floor before the roof approach and has the most warp connections of any floor (six total). One warp descends to 7F at (2,5); five warps ascend to various positions on 9F at (2,11), (16,7), (10,3), (14,15), and (6,9). Three item balls provide substantial rewards: Full Restore at (3,1) in the far northwest, Max Elixir at (11,6) in the center, and Nugget at (7,13) in the south. The five 9F entry points from 8F form the second half of the tower's warp puzzle. No NPCs or trainers are present.
